inputs.label: Total Property Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total acquisition cost of the property including land and improvements.

inputs.label: Land Value Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total cost allocated to land (non-depreciable).

inputs.label: Building Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allocated to building structure (depreciable over 39 years typically).

inputs.label: Personal Property Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allocated to 5- or 7-year property like equipment, furniture.

inputs.label: Land Improvements Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allocated to land improvements (depreciable over 15 years).

inputs.label: Building Depreciation Life
inputs.businessContext: IRS recovery period for non-residential real property (39 years).

inputs.label: Personal Property Life
inputs.businessContext: Recovery period for personal property (5 or 7 years).

inputs.label: Land Improvements Life
inputs.businessContext: Recovery period for land improvements (15 years).
